CustomField.description: Used to load the value of the Intercompany Payment checkbox on Edit mode and to create the payment with Intercompany Offset checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates if the payment was received by one company on behalf of one or more different companies. E.g. Entity A receives cash in it's bank account on behalf on invoices related to Entity B and Entity C.
CustomField.label: Intercompany Payment
